commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh To whom are you thus like in glory and in greatness among the trees of Eden. yet shall you be brought down with the trees of Eden unto the lower parts of the earth: you shall lie in the midst of the uncircumcised with them that are slain by the sword. This is Pharaoh and all his multitude, says the Lord GOD. Famous king of Assyria, or of Egypt. (Calmet) Mutato nomine de te Fabula narratur. ) Though Egypt be like the most potent kingdoms, it shall likewise fall. (Worthington).
